source: from pyspark.sql import functions as F

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

decision_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_95498/*.csv"

decision_raw = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")              # IMPORTANT: Horizon extracts are pipe-delimited
        .option("quote", "\"")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .option("multiLine", "false")    # safer unless you KNOW values span lines
        .load(decision_path)
)

print("Decision rows loaded:", decision_raw.count())
print("Decision columns:", decision_raw.columns)

display(decision_raw.limit(10))

decision_ready = (
    decision_raw
    .select(
        F.col("ID").cast("string").alias("legacyCaseId"),  # CaseNodeId
        F.col("1").alias("attr1"),
        F.col("46").alias("decisionIssue"),
        F.col("52").alias("casePublishFlag"),
        F.col("74").alias("decisionType"),
        F.col("79").alias("decisionBranch"),
    )
    # trim + nullify blanks/"undefined"
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("legacyCaseId")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.when((F.col("attr1").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("attr1")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("attr1"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("attr1"))).alias("attr1"),
        F.when((F.col("decisionIssue").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("decisionIssue")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionIssue"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("decisionIssue"))).alias("decisionIssue"),
        F.when((F.col("casePublishFlag").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("casePublishFlag")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("casePublishFlag"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("casePublishFlag"))).alias("casePublishFlag"),
        F.when((F.col("decisionType").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("decisionType")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("decisionType"))).alias("decisionType"),
        F.when((F.col("decisionBranch").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("decisionBranch")) == "") | (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionBranch"))) == "undefined"), None)
         .otherwise(F.trim(F.col("decisionBranch"))).alias("decisionBranch"),
    )
)

print("Decision rows (selected):", decision_ready.count())
display(decision_ready.limit(50))

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# -------------------------------------------------
# LOAD SECRETARY OF STATE DECISIONS
# -------------------------------------------------

sos_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Secretary_Of_State_Decision_19674254/*.csv"

sos_raw = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")
        .option("quote", "\"")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .option("multiLine", "false")
        .load(sos_path)
)

def clean(c):
    return (
        F.when(
            (c.isNull()) |
            (F.trim(c) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(c)) == "undefined"),
            None
        ).otherwise(F.trim(c))
    )

# -------------------------------------------------
# SELECT + BASIC CLEAN
# -------------------------------------------------

sos_ready = (
    sos_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("attr1"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("13")).alias("decisionIssue"),
        clean(F.col("15").cast("string")).alias("casePublishFlag"),
        clean(F.col("14").cast("string")).alias("decisionType"),
        clean(F.col("1").cast("string")).alias("decisionBranch"),
    )
)

# -------------------------------------------------
# NORMALISE decisionType (FIX THE 54 TYPES ISSUE)
# -------------------------------------------------

dt = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType")))

sos_ready = (
    sos_ready
    # Fix obvious typos
    .withColumn(
        "decisionType_norm",
        F.when(dt.isin("dimissed", "dismiss"), "dismissed")
         .otherwise(dt)
    )
    # Collapse free text / narrative values
    .withColumn(
        "decisionType",
        F.when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("allow"), "Allowed")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("dismiss"), "Dismissed")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("refus"), "Refused")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("confirm") & F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("modification"), "Confirmed with modifications")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("confirm"), "Confirmed")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("grant") & F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("condition"), "Granted with conditions")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("grant"), "Granted")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("order not made"), "Order not made")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("not made"), "Not made")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("made") & F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("modification"), "Order made with modifications")
         .when(F.col("decisionType_norm").contains("made"), "Order made")
         .otherwise(None)  # drop narrative junk
    )
    .drop("decisionType_norm")
)

# Optional: quick validation
display(
    sos_ready.groupBy("decisionType")
        .count()
        .orderBy(F.desc("count"))
)

# -------------------------------------------------
# UNION INTO EXISTING DECISIONS
# -------------------------------------------------

decision_ready = decision_ready.unionByName(
    sos_ready,
    allowMissingColumns=True
)

print("Secretary of State rows added:", sos_ready.count())
print("Decision rows (combined):", decision_ready.count())
display(sos_ready.limit(100))

# --------------------------------------------
# DECISION TYPE SUMMARY (SOS ONLY)
# --------------------------------------------

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

sos_summary = (
    sos_ready
        .groupBy("decisionType")
        .agg(F.count("*").alias("row_count"))
        .orderBy(F.desc("row_count"))
)

print("Distinct decision types:", sos_summary.count())
display(sos_summary)

# Null check
null_count = sos_ready.filter(F.col("decisionType").isNull()).count()
print("Null decisionType rows:", null_count)

cases_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .load(cases_path)
)

print("Cases rows loaded:", cases_raw.count())
print("Cases columns:", cases_raw.columns)   # should be ['Case ID', 'GUID']
display(cases_raw.limit(20))

cases_key = (
    cases_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("Case ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.trim(F.col("GUID")).alias("caseId")   # new Case GUID
    )
    .filter(F.col("legacyCaseId").isNotNull() & F.col("caseId").isNotNull())
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyCaseId"])
)

print("cases_key rows:", cases_key.count())
display(cases_key.limit(20))

decision_with_guid = (
    decision_ready
    .join(cases_key, on="legacyCaseId", how="inner")
    .drop("legacyCaseId")   # keep only GUID for loading
)

print("Decision rows with GUID:", decision_with_guid.count())
display(decision_with_guid.limit(50))

# any decision rows that didn't match a case guid?
unmatched = decision_ready.join(cases_key, on="legacyCaseId", how="left_anti").count()
print("Unmatched decision rows (no case guid):", unmatched)

# duplicates by caseId (should usually be 1 row per case)
dupes = decision_with_guid.groupBy("caseId").count().filter(F.col("count") > 1).count()
print("Duplicate caseId rows:", dupes)

# how many actually have a decisionType?
print("Rows with decisionType:", decision_with_guid.filter(F.col("decisionType").isNotNull()).count())

decision_final = (
    decision_with_guid
    .withColumn("dtypeId", F.lit("decision"))
)

display(decision_final.limit(50))
print("Final row count:", decision_final.count())

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# Normalise decisionType for matching
dt_norm = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType")))

decision_mapped = (
    decision_final
    .withColumn(
        "outcomeId",
        F.when(dt_norm.isNull(), F.lit(None))

        # -----------------------------
        # Rights of Way (exact names)
        # -----------------------------
        .when(dt_norm == "allow", F.lit("allow"))
        .when(dt_norm == "confirmed", F.lit("confirmed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "confirmed with modifications", F.lit("confirmed-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt_norm == "directed", F.lit("directed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not allowed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not confirmed", F.lit("not-confirmed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not directed", F.lit("not-directed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not granted", F.lit("not-granted"))
        .when(dt_norm == "partially allow", F.lit("partially-allow"))
        .when(dt_norm == "propose not to confirm", F.lit("propose-not-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt_norm == "propose to confirm", F.lit("propose-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt_norm == "modified (adv)", F.lit("modified-adv"))
        .when(dt_norm == "modified (not adv)", F.lit("modified-not-adv"))

        # -----------------------------
        # Common spelling / formatting variants
        # -----------------------------
        .when(dt_norm == "partially-allow", F.lit("partially-allow"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not-confirmed", F.lit("not-confirmed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not-allowed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not-directed", F.lit("not-directed"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not-granted", F.lit("not-granted"))
        .when(dt_norm == "propose-not-to-confirm", F.lit("propose-not-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt_norm == "propose-to-confirm", F.lit("propose-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt_norm == "modified adv", F.lit("modified-adv"))
        .when(dt_norm == "modified not adv", F.lit("modified-not-adv"))
        .when(dt_norm == "confirmed-with-modifications", F.lit("confirmed-with-modifications"))

        # -----------------------------
        # SOS / planning-style decisions
        # (works best if you run the SOS normaliser earlier)
        # -----------------------------
        .when(dt_norm == "allowed", F.lit("allow"))
        .when(dt_norm.startswith("allowed"), F.lit("allow"))  # allowed with conditions / subject to conditions
        .when(dt_norm == "appeal allowed", F.lit("allow"))

        .when(dt_norm == "dismissed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("dismiss"), F.lit("not-allowed"))

        .when(dt_norm == "refused", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("refus"), F.lit("not-allowed"))

        # granted outcomes
        .when(dt_norm.contains("granted") & dt_norm.contains("condition"), F.lit("granted-with-conditions"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("granted"), F.lit("granted-without-conditions"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("permission granted"), F.lit("granted-without-conditions"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("planning permission granted"), F.lit("granted-without-conditions"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("approval granted"), F.lit("granted-without-conditions"))

        # order outcomes
        .when(dt_norm == "order made with modifications", F.lit("order-made-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("made") & dt_norm.contains("modification"), F.lit("order-made-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt_norm == "order made", F.lit("order-made"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("order made"), F.lit("order-made"))
        .when(dt_norm == "order not made", F.lit("order-not-made"))
        .when(dt_norm == "not made", F.lit("order-not-made"))
        .when(dt_norm.contains("not made"), F.lit("order-not-made"))

        # -----------------------------
        # Default: if decisionType is present but unknown -> other
        # (prevents dropping rows silently)
        # -----------------------------
        .otherwise(F.when(F.col("decisionType").isNotNull(), F.lit("other")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    )
)

display(decision_mapped.select("decisionType", "outcomeId").dropDuplicates().orderBy("decisionType"))

unmapped = (
    decision_mapped
    .filter(F.col("decisionType").isNotNull() & F.col("outcomeId").isNull())
    .groupBy("decisionType")
    .count()
    .orderBy(F.desc("count"))
)

display(unmapped)
print("Unmapped distinct decisionType values:", unmapped.count())

output_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Decision"

(
    decision_for_load   # use your final dataframe here
        .coalesce(1)            # single CSV file like your other transforms
        .write
        .mode("overwrite")      # switch to "append" only if intentionally adding
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")     # keep consistent with Horizon pipe format
        .csv(output_path)
)

print("Decision CSV written to:", output_path)
